hero.bio: 30+ years of experience in program management across infrastructure, telecom, and digital consultancy sectors with strong capability in strategic planning, forecasting, budgeting, operational excellence, resource planning, stakeholder management, and pre-sales.

about.quote: I bring dedication to achieve the business goals by utilizing my in-depth knowledge and 30+ years' experience in program management of infrastructure, telecom and digital consultancy sectors along with business acumen for strategic planning, forecasting, budgeting and analysis, operational excellence, resource planning, stakeholder management, pre-sales and sales.
paragraphs: In the last 15+ years, I have delivered large-scale and high-value infrastructure projects for Saudi Electricity Company, municipalities across KSA, and rollout, transformation, swap, and merger projects for telecom operators in the Middle East including Etisalat, Mobily, China Mobile, and Veon Group.

More recently, I have provided PMO functional oversight, governance, and delivery assurance for digital governance and transformation consultancy programs for Saudi organizations including ZATCA, HRDA, SEC, TGA, NDMO, SDAIA, and GSTAT.

experience.description: Leading PMO and operational governance for consultancy programs worth SAR 40M annually focused on data governance, cybersecurity, and digital transformation across major Saudi government and private entities.
bullets: Established and led the Enterprise PMO with standardized project management methodologies, governance frameworks, and delivery controls
Implemented performance management systems, KPIs, and executive dashboards
Strengthened portfolio risk management, quality assurance, and compliance aligned with SDAIA, NDMO, GDPR, ISO 9001, and ISO 27001

experience.role: Manager Telecommunication Network / PME Calibration & Maintenance Specialist
experience.description: Served in telecom network management and calibration and maintenance of TMDEs.
bullets: PME Calibration & Maintenance Specialist: Oct 1993 – Dec 2003

achievements.title: SEC & Municipalities
achievements.back: Won SAR 67M infrastructure projects in Saudi Arabia.

achievements.title: SEVEN Jazan
achievements.back: Secured SAR 68M turnkey ICT, Security, and AV contract for SEVEN Jazan.

projects.name: PTCL IP MPLS Swap (Nationwide)
projects.desc: Strategic network transformation replacing legacy Cisco and Juniper platforms.

experience_detail: 20+ years in infrastructure developments in Govt, Telecom & Energy sectors
10 years in avionics engineering (Calibration & Maintenance of TMDEs)

contact.subtitle: Open to roles in program management, PMO governance, infrastructure, telecom modernization, managed services, and business operations.
